title: pilosella sudetorum
intro: Pilosella sudetorum, also known as the Sudeley dandelion or Sudeley hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and liver problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Pilosella sudetorum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, improve liver function, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Pilosella sudetorum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
